narrative.description: Square's landmark PS1 RPG combines pre-rendered backgrounds with 3D battles, Materia customization, and a globe-spanning eco-terrorism narrative centered on Cloud, Sephiroth, and the planet's Lifestream.
narrative.core_loop: Explore the world map and dungeons, customize Materia loadouts, exploit enemy weaknesses in ATB battles, and advance the main quest through scripted set pieces.

mechanics.map_notes: ATB gauge fills in real time; commands execute when slots are ready.
mechanics.expression: ATB gauge fills in real time; commands execute when slots are ready.

mechanics.map_notes: Experience, levels, and Materia growth expand stats and spell libraries.
mechanics.expression: Experience, levels, and Materia growth expand stats and spell libraries.

mechanics.map_notes: Materia sockets on weapons and armor swap magic, summons, and commands.
mechanics.expression: Materia sockets on weapons and armor swap magic, summons, and commands.

mechanics.map_notes: Three-member party takes turns selecting commands under ATB pressure.
mechanics.expression: Three-member party takes turns selecting commands under ATB pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: Story bosses and key events unlock new regions and vehicles.
mechanics.expression: Story bosses and key events unlock new regions and vehicles.

mechanics.map_notes: Sephiroth and Weapon fights span multiple forms and arenas.
mechanics.expression: Sephiroth and Weapon fights span multiple forms and arenas.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses telegraph limit-breakable windows and elemental weaknesses.
mechanics.expression: Bosses telegraph limit-breakable windows and elemental weaknesses.

mechanics.map_notes: Optional Weapons, chocobo breeding, and side quests extend endgame.
mechanics.expression: Optional Weapons, chocobo breeding, and side quests extend endgame.

mechanics.map_notes: Shops and materia vendors gate access to gear and spells.
mechanics.expression: Shops and materia vendors gate access to gear and spells.

mechanics.map_notes: Gil from battles funds equipment and consumables.
mechanics.expression: Gil from battles funds equipment and consumables.

mechanics.map_notes: Dungeon traps and timed escapes test traversal under pressure.
mechanics.expression: Dungeon traps and timed escapes test traversal under pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: HP and MP pools deplete in combat requiring rest and items.
mechanics.expression: HP and MP pools deplete in combat requiring rest and items.

mechanics.map_notes: Save points and world map access checkpoint progress.
mechanics.expression: Save points and world map access checkpoint progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss charge attacks display visible wind-up animations.
mechanics.expression: Boss charge attacks display visible wind-up animations.

mechanics.map_notes: Limit Breaks trigger at low HP with cinematic attacks.
mechanics.expression: Limit Breaks trigger at low HP with cinematic attacks.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Final Fantasy VII through its core rpg loop.
